my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Migrate the import statement from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed in Java 11+ and not present in standard Jakarta EE 9+ distributions; code fails to compile without the jakarta import.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Update the version string in the generated annotation comment to reflect the new JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.annotation does not exist' on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Rename logger field from 'log' to 'LOG' to follow Java naming conventions for static final fields.
Update logger method calls to use the renamed 'LOG' field.
Extract spring.application.name property into a local variable for cleaner code.
Replace string concatenation in log message with Java 13+ text blocks for improved readability.
Refactor logger method call indentation and line breaks for consistency.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.before:
logger(joinPoint)
                .error(
                    "Exception in {}() with cause = '{}' and exception = '{}'",
                    joinPoint.getSignature().getName(),
                    e.getCause() != null ? e.getCause() : "NULL",
                    e.getMessage(),
                    e
                );
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.after:
logger(joinPoint).error(
                "Exception in {}() with cause = '{}' and exception = '{}'",
                joinPoint.getSignature().getName(),
                e.getCause() != null ? e.getCause() : "NULL",
                e.getMessage(),
                e
            );

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Replace ternary null check with String.valueOf to handle potential null cause safely and concisely.
Add a nested Liquibase configuration class with an asyncStart property to ApplicationProperties.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.after: private final Liquibase liquibase = new Liquibase(); ... public static class Liquibase { private Boolean asyncStart = true; ... }

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Rename instance logger field to static final constant following Java logging best practices.
Update logger variable references to match the new static constant name.
Update marker checking logic to use the new getMarkerList() API introduced in SLF4J 2.0.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: The method ILoggingEvent.getMarker() is deprecated in SLF4J 2.0 and may be removed in future versions; using getMarkerList() ensures compatibility with the new API where markers are handled as a list.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.after:
List<Marker> markers = event.getMarkerList();
if ((markers != null && !markers.isEmpty() && markers.get(0).contains(CRLF_SAFE_MARKER)) || isLoggerSafe(event))

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Add import for java.util.List to support the new marker list logic.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: The code now uses the List interface, requiring the import to compile.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Rename constant SAFE_LOGGERS to SAFE_LOGS for better naming consistency.
Expand the list of safe loggers to include Spring Boot auto-configuration and diagnostics.
Add Javadoc documentation explaining the purpose of the CRLFLogConverter class.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.after: /** * Log filter to prevent attackers from forging log entries by submitting input containing CRLF characters. * CRLF characters are replaced with a red colored _ character. * * @see Log Forging Description * @see JHipster issue */

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Remove the LOGIN_REGEX constant from the Constants class.
Remove unused import org.slf4j.Logger
Remove unused import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory
Remove unused import org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean
Remove unused import tech.jhipster.config.JHipsterConstants
Replace Hibernate 5 Jackson module with Hibernate 6 module to align with the upgraded Hibernate version.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: Hibernate5Module is removed or incompatible with Hibernate 6; using it causes compilation errors or runtime linkage failures.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Remove Zalando Problem modules from Jackson configuration.
Add custom serializer for LocalTime to ensure consistent string serialization.
Replace deprecated Profiles.of() with matchesProfiles() for profile checking.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: Profiles.of() is deprecated in Spring Framework 5.3+ and removed in Spring Framework 6.0 (required for Spring Boot 3.x / Java 17+), causing compilation errors.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Update Liquibase contexts and labels setters to use comma-delimited strings instead of collections.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: Liquibase 4.x+ deprecated/removed setContexts(Collection) and setLabels(Collection) in favor of setContexts(String) and setLabelFilter(String), causing compilation errors due to missing methods.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Add conditional logic to support synchronous Liquibase startup based on application properties.
Refactor logger instance to follow standard naming conventions (static final LOG).
Reorder method parameters to group related dependencies and add ApplicationProperties.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Security 5 annotations with Spring Security 6 equivalents.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: The classes EnableWebSecurity and EnableGlobalMethodSecurity were removed in Spring Security 6; using them causes a compilation error.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Update HttpSecurity DSL to use lambda-based configuration and new matcher types.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: The methods authorizeRequests(), antMatchers(), and the fluent .and() chaining were removed in Spring Security 6; using them causes a compilation error.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 (required for JDK 17) uses Jakarta EE 9+, so javax.servlet classes are no longer available, causing compilation errors.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Remove dependency on removed SecurityProblemSupport class.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: The class org.zalando.problem.spring.web.advice.security.SecurityProblemSupport was removed or relocated in newer versions, causing compilation errors if imported.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Remove constructor injection of removed dependencies.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: The fields corsFilter and problemSupport are removed, so injecting them causes compilation errors.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.before: public SecurityConfiguration(CorsFilter corsFilter, JHipsterProperties jHipsterProperties, SecurityProblemSupport problemSupport)

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Replace custom JwtGrantedAuthorityConverter with inline converter.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: The class JwtGrantedAuthorityConverter was removed from the codebase, causing a compilation error if referenced.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Add MvcRequestMatcher bean for Spring Security 6 request matching.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: Spring Security 6 requires MvcRequestMatcher.Builder for MVC-based request matching; without it, the new authorizeHttpRequests configuration cannot compile or function correctly.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Configure OAuth2 Login with custom OidcUserService.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: The previous configuration did not explicitly configure the userInfoEndpoint for OIDC, which may lead to runtime issues or missing user info in Spring Security 6.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Add custom SpaCsrfTokenRequestHandler for BREACH protection.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: This is a security enhancement for SPAs, not a compilation requirement.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.after: static final class SpaCsrfTokenRequestHandler implements CsrfTokenRequestHandler { ... }

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Update CSRF configuration to use the new handler.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: This aligns with the new security best practices for SPAs.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Remove unused imports.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: These imports are no longer used in the code.

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Add new imports for Spring Security 6 features.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: These imports are required for the new configuration.
